extraction.one_line_summary: OLDANI Stefan won from 25-rider breakaway that formed after 70km of racing at 55km/h, attacking with Rota at 50km to go on penultimate climb
tactical_patterns: Bardiani missed initial break, burned two domestiques Caburo/Kovili plus borrowed Zardini/Jocatli to bridge 70km into race—expensive tactical error
Oldani/Rota attacked on penultimate classified climb with 50km remaining, forcing chasers to organize rather than launching from final climb
GC group conceded 8+ minutes to Kelderman in break despite him being only 11 minutes down—unusual passive riding

rider_signals.KELDERMAN Bauke: neutral: present in break and gained 8 minutes but Hamilton also there suggests team didn't protect his GC position
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: attempted solo attack before break formed, showing aggressive intentions unusual for race leader's team
rider_signals.OLDANI Stefan: positive: won despite attacking twice in final kilometer showing tactical awareness compensating for sprint weakness
